overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing a character in 18th-century assassin attire exploring a French palace interior. The character moves from an outdoor stone courtyard through grand halls and rooms littered with dead bodies, ascending a staircase to an upper study. Warm sunlight streams through tall windows, illuminating ornate classical architecture with red carpets and oil paintings.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace exterior entrance with stone courtyard

events.description: character enters the palace through large wooden doors from outdoor courtyard to interior
lighting shifts from bright exterior to dimmer interior with dramatic shadows

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand entrance of the stone palace, transitioning from outdoor courtyard to interior hall

notable_agents.action: dead body lying on the red carpet at the base of the stairs

entered.detail: grand stone palace exterior with tall columns and classical architecture
large ornate wooden doors with carved details marking the entrance
sweeping marble staircase visible through the entrance doorway
crimson carpet runner leading through the interior spaces

segments.scene_description: The segment begins outside a grand stone palace with classical columns. The character approaches and enters through large wooden doors into a dimly lit interior. Inside, a marble staircase is visible with dead bodies scattered on a red carpet, indicating a recent violent event. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dramatic interior shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor palace corridor with massacre aftermath

events.description: character turns right to navigate around dead bodies in the hallway
moves from narrow corridor into wider hall with large windows

agents.ego_description: navigating through the ground floor rooms, stepping over dead bodies while examining the surroundings

notable_agents.action: multiple dead bodies in period clothing lying on the floor

entered.detail: black and white checkered marble flooring pattern
tall fluted columns with ornate capitals lining the corridors
large framed classical painting hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character explores the ground floor interior, moving through corridors with checkered marble floors and classical columns. Dead bodies in period clothing are scattered throughout, suggesting a recent massacre. The space features ornate wall sconces and large oil paintings. Natural light filters in from windows as the character navigates around the bodies.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace chapel or assembly hall with rows of seating

events.description: enters a chapel-like space with rows of wooden benches and an altar area
enters room with massive wall painting and chandelier, lighting becomes warmer

agents.ego_description: walking through the chapel area toward a grand gallery with a massive painting

entered.detail: rows of wooden benches arranged facing the altar
decorative altar with candles and religious iconography
very large framed historical battle scene dominating the wall
crystal chandelier hanging from the ornate ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a chapel-like space with rows of wooden benches and an ornate altar, then enters a grand gallery featuring a massive oil painting depicting a historical battle. A crystal chandelier hangs from the ceiling, and warm sunlight streams through tall windows, illuminating the red carpet and checkered floors.

events.description: character begins ascending the grand marble staircase
reaches the top of the stairs and enters the upper floor corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand marble staircase with wrought iron railings to reach the upper floor

entered.detail: sweeping marble staircase with ornate wrought iron railings and stone balustrades
decorative black iron railing with gold accents along the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a grand marble staircase with ornate wrought iron railings. The camera follows the ascent, showing the detailed stonework and decorative elements of the stairwell. Upon reaching the top, the character enters an upper floor area with different lighting and architectural details.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor study or office with desk and scattered papers

events.description: character activates vision mode, outfit changes to white and the environment highlights
character stops to examine the desk area then continues moving

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper study, activating eagle vision mode which turns the character's outfit white, examining the desk with scattered papers

entered.detail: large ornate wooden desk with scattered papers and books
heavy red velvet curtains framing the tall windows
documents and papers strewn across the floor and desk surface

segments.scene_description: The character explores an upper floor study featuring a large wooden desk with scattered papers, red velvet curtains, and warm sunlight streaming through windows. The character activates a special vision mode that turns their outfit white, highlighting interactive elements in the room. The space shows signs of hurried departure with documents strewn about.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright exterior of a classical palace into a series of opulent, blood-stained interiors that culminate in a private upper study. It begins by passing through grand wooden doors, where the bright sunlight shifts into dramatic interior shadows as the camera reveals a marble staircase and red carpets littered with dead bodies. The movement then flows through corridors of checkered marble and a chapel-like space, passing under crystal chandeliers and massive oil paintings while natural light filters through tall windows. As the camera ascends a grand marble staircase with ornate wrought iron railings, the scene opens into an upper floor study filled with red velvet curtains and scattered documents. Finally, the lighting shifts as a special vision mode is activated, turning the character's attire white to highlight interactive elements within the sunlit room.
